---
title: "Shift Fixed Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        - ['shift: false']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

This tests `shift: false` where the note stays fixed and other notes move around it.

Line with fixed note [FIXED: I stay exactly where I am placed, others move around me]{.column-margin shift="false"}.
Line with auto note [AUTO: I should shift down to avoid the fixed note above]{.column-margin}.
Line with another auto [AUTO 2: I shift down further]{.column-margin}.
